bug_description: Same-bar entry bias: direction determined by bar t's CLOSE but entry at bar t's OPEN. In reality, you cannot know the close before the bar ends, so entering at the open of the same bar uses future information.
fix_description: Introduced pending-entry mechanism: signal formed on bar t is stored as pending. On bar t+1, pending executes at that bar's OPEN. TP recomputed from actual entry price. SL stays at absolute opening-range level.

changes: Added clearing of pending state in reset() and _reset_day()
Rewrote on_bar() single-candidate: pending entry execution before exit checks, entry logic stores pending instead of entering
Rewrote _on_bar_multi(): pending candidates execution before exit checks, selected candidates stored as pending
Added structured CAUSAL ENTRY logging for every entry
Changed _identify_ema_candidates(): entry_price now uses NEXT bar's open (not decision bar's open)
Added entry_time field to candidate rows for causal forward scan
TP recomputed from actual entry price
Changed _label_candidates(): forward scan starts from entry_time (not decision time)
Added decision_time: Optional[datetime.datetime] to Signal dataclass
Stored decision_time in open_positions dict during entry
Propagated decision_time to Trade construction in normal exit and _force_close

test_names: test_no_same_bar_entry — entry on bar after decision, not same bar
test_entry_at_next_bar_open — entry price is execution bar open
test_decision_time_populated — Signal.decision_time set to decision bar timestamp
test_sl_at_absolute_range_level — SL stays at opening range boundary
test_short_entry_causal — short entries also deferred to next bar
test_same_bar_entry_and_exit — entry bar can also trigger SL/TP exit

model_training_data.note: Lower than pre-fix because causal entry (next-bar open) reduces edge vs same-bar open

validation_backtest.note: System is no longer profitable with current ML threshold (0.60). This confirms the old results were inflated by same-bar entry bias. The system is now truthful and needs re-optimization.

stop_target_anchoring.tp: Recomputed from actual entry: actual_entry ± RR × range_size

invariant: A signal formed on bar t may only enter on bar t+1 or later. decision_time < entry timestamp for every trade.
notes: ML model MUST be retrained after this fix (labels change)
The system needs re-optimization: lower ML threshold, different features, or different strategy parameters
EMA Directional benchmark (no ML) earned $1,133 in same period for comparison
